allowlist.usage: Usage: /allow <telegram id> — the person gets their id from @userinfobot.
allowlist.nowClosed: The bot was open — allowlist started with {{id}} and you. Now closed to {{count}} user(s).
allowlist.cantDenyAdmin: Refusing: that is the admin id. Denying it would lock you out of every command, including /allow.
allowlist.open: No allowlist — the bot is OPEN to anyone who finds it. /allow <id> starts one (you are included automatically).
allowlist.unavailable: Runtime allowlist editing is not available in this build — configure the allowlist in .env and restart.

delete.done: All your data has been deleted. /start to begin again.

errors.analyzeFailed: Couldn't read that 🤔 send the photo again.
errors.correctionFailed: Couldn't apply that correction — try phrasing it differently.
errors.redateFailed: Couldn't move that meal — it may have been deleted. Send it again to re-log it.
errors.dailyCap: You've hit today's photo limit — come back tomorrow.
errors.globalCap: The shared demo bot has hit today's analysis limit — it runs on one person's API budget. Try again tomorrow, or run your own instance: https://github.com/kirmalyshev/eait Want unlimited hosted access when a paid tier opens? /waitlist
errors.notAnImage: That's not an image 🤔 send a photo of the meal.
errors.fileTooBig: That file is too big for me to fetch — send it as a photo instead.
errors.rejectionExplain: That photo wasn't recognized as food, so nothing was logged and I have no analysis for it. Send a clearer photo, or just describe the meal in text.
errors.textFailed: I couldn't process that message — please try again.

text.pendingGone: That one already expired — send the meal again if you still want it logged.

help.body:
Send me a photo of your meal and I'll estimate the calories and macros. You can also send multiple photos in one message (album) and I'll treat them as a single meal.

Describe a meal in text too — just type what you ate (say "yesterday" or "2 days ago" to back-date it) and I'll log it after you confirm.

Ask me anything about nutrition, your goal, or today's intake and I'll answer.

Got an estimate wrong? Reply directly to my analysis message with a correction — for example "two pieces, no oil" — and I'll redo it. Reply "move to yesterday" to re-file that meal on another day.

Better photos, better estimates:
• shoot from above, the whole plate in frame
• good light; cutlery or your hand next to the plate helps me judge portion size
• know the weight or ingredients? add them in the caption

Commands:
/me — today's totals
/cap — today's LLM call usage
/settings — change your goal, restrictions, language or reply style
/help — this message
/delete — erase all your data

Estimates from a photo are approximate and are not medical advice.

me.profileLine: Profile: goal — {{goal}}; weight — {{weight}}; target — {{target}}; country — {{country}}; restrictions — {{restrictions}}

meal.correctionHint: ↩️ Not right? Reply to this message with a correction.
meal.lowConfidenceHint: 🤔 I'm not sure about the portion size. Reply to this message with the weight or contents (for example "340g" or "two patties, no oil") and I'll redo the estimate.

onboarding.consent:
Hi! I analyse photos of your food and count calories and macros against your goal.

What you should know:
• I process food photos and your profile (goal, weight, restrictions).
• Restrictions can include health conditions (kidneys, cholesterol). You never have to give one — tap Skip.
• Estimates are approximate — this is not medical advice.
• Photos are not stored: I analyse them and delete them immediately.
• Photos and your profile are sent to an AI provider to produce the estimate.
• /delete erases all your data and withdraws this consent.
• Full policy: https://github.com/kirmalyshev/eait/blob/main/docs/PRIVACY.md

Do you agree to this data being processed?
onboarding.decline: Without consent I can't process your data. Send /start when you're ready.
onboarding.askWeight: What's your current weight? I use it to set your protein target. Send it in kilograms (for example 92.5) or tap "Skip".
onboarding.weightInvalid: That doesn't look like a weight in kilograms — send a number between 30 and 300 (for example 92.5), or tap "Skip".
onboarding.askTargetWeight: What's your target weight? I use it to track progress toward your goal. Send it in kilograms (for example 85) or tap "Skip".
onboarding.targetWeightInvalid: That doesn't look like a weight in kilograms — send a number between 30 and 300 (for example 85), or tap "Skip".
onboarding.askCountry: Where do you buy most of your food? I use it to recognise local products and portion sizes. Pick a country, tap "Other" to type it, or "Skip".
onboarding.countryInvalid: I didn't catch that — pick a country below, tap "Other" to type it, or "Skip".
onboarding.countryOther: Type the country where you buy most of your food.
onboarding.askRestrictions: Any health or dietary restrictions? Write freely (for example: "kidneys, no sugar") or tap "Skip".
onboarding.done:
All set — send me photos of your food 📸

For the most accurate estimates:
• shoot from above, the whole plate in frame
• good light; cutlery or your hand next to the plate helps me judge portion size
• know the weight or ingredients? add them in the caption
onboarding.alreadyActive: You're already set up — just send photos of your food 📸 (/me — profile and today's totals).
onboarding.nudge: Tap a button above, or send /start.

settings.title: Settings
settings.askRestrictions: Tap a restriction to switch it on or off:
settings.askWeight: Send your current weight in kilograms (for example 92.5).
settings.askTargetWeight: Send your target weight in kilograms (for example 85).
settings.askCountry: Where do you buy most of your food? Pick a country below, or tap "Other" to type it.

cap.current:
Global cap: {{cap}} · used today: {{used}}
Change: /cap 200 · /cap off · /cap reset
cap.reset: Global daily cap reset to the configured value: {{cap}}.

waitlist.joined: You're on the waitlist 🎟 I'll message you here when the unlimited tier opens.
waitlist.already: Already on the waitlist — I'll message you here as soon as it opens.
